description: You are a Talon Voice power user managing a large custom command set. Resolve all command conflicts where the same voice trigger phrase appears in multiple .talon files within C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community\user_commands\. For each conflict, keep the most specific version and comment out or remove the less specific duplicate(s) without deleting any files. Document each conflict and its resolution in a plain-text audit report at C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community\user_commands\audit_report.txt.
